def positive_compression_hashing_or_encoding_performed_before_cheap_reject_checks():
    rule_id = "compression_hashing_or_encoding_performed_before_cheap_reject_checks"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag expensive transforms performed before simple guard checks that could skip the work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
